tagline: A 90-day deep-work coaching program for builders who keep getting interrupted.
deliverables: 12 weekly 1:1 deep-work coaching calls (60 min each)
A personalized focus operating system (attention audit + weekly block plan)
Async accountability via a shared progress log with same-day reviews
The Deep-Work Field Manual (workbook + template pack)
guarantee: Ship a real 90-day focus transformation or get a full refund: complete the first 4 weeks, and if your tracked deep-work hours have not at least doubled, we refund every dollar.
bonuses: Bonus 2: lifetime access to the template pack updates
Bonus 3: one emergency re-focus call when a launch week goes sideways
positioning: The only coaching program that rebuilds your attention as an operating system instead of selling you another productivity app.
icp: Founders, senior engineers, and solo operators doing high-stakes creative work who lose 2+ hours a day to context-switching and want a guaranteed system, not tips.

offer_value_architecture.dream_outcome: Double your tracked deep-work hours in 90 days with a repeatable system you keep forever.
offer_value_architecture.perceived_likelihood_of_achievement: Doubled-hours-or-refund guarantee + weekly 1:1 + same-day async review reduce the risk of not achieving it.
offer_value_architecture.time_delay: Compressed: first measurable win in week 1 (attention audit), the headline outcome promised by day 90.
offer_value_architecture.effort_and_sacrifice: Reduced: done-with-you blocks and templates remove the planning burden; the program installs the system for them.
offer_value_architecture.value_equation_note: Maximize (dream outcome x perceived likelihood) / (time delay x effort) per Hormozi's value equation; the guarantee is the likelihood lever, the templates are the effort lever.

note: Per N3 single-owner rule: the CSO references the offer persona but does NOT write the hormozi-100m-offers selection-log entry; the Funnel Strategist (P1) owns it.
